# DC CAP Logo Base64 Reference for HTML Embedding

Generated 2026-04-03. Four optimized variants for self-contained HTML deliverables.

Copy the base64 string directly into `<img src="data:image/png;base64,{STRING}">` tags.

---

## hero_white

**Description:** Primary logo (white/greyscale) — 400×220px — for dark hero sections, gradient mesh backgrounds

**Usage:** Title slides, hero sections, dark-background headers

**Characters:** 19,748

```

```

---

## nav_purple

**Description:** Primary logo (purple column + navy text) — 180×99px — for light nav bars, frosted glass nav

**Usage:** Sticky navigation, light-background headers, document headers

**Characters:** 13,552

```

```

---

## icon_navy_small

**Description:** Column icon (navy) — 40×58px — for compact nav, favicon-size placement on light backgrounds

**Usage:** Small nav badges, watermarks, favicon stand-in

**Characters:** 2,572

```

```

---

## icon_white_small

**Description:** Column icon (white) — 40×58px — for footers on dark backgrounds, compact placements

**Usage:** Footers, dark-background compact logos, watermarks

**Characters:** 1,404

```

```

---


## Standard Placement Pattern

```html
<!-- Hero (dark background) -->
<div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:clamp(1rem,2vw,2rem);">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64,{hero_white}" alt="DC CAP Scholars" 
       style="height:clamp(50px,8vw,90px);filter:drop-shadow(0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.3));">
</div>

<!-- Nav (light/frosted glass background) -->
<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;padding:clamp(0.5rem,1.5vw,1rem) clamp(1rem,3vw,3rem) 0;">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64,{nav_purple}" alt="DC CAP Scholars" 
       style="height:clamp(28px,4vw,44px);margin-right:auto;">
</div>

<!-- Footer (dark background) -->
<div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:clamp(0.5rem,1vw,1rem);">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64,{icon_white_small}" alt="DC CAP" 
       style="height:28px;opacity:0.85;">
</div>
```
